title: Running events in Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For those wanting to stay...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For those wanting to stay active this holiday season, take note of these running events.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - For those wanting to stay active this holiday season, take note of these running events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hart & Bosch Village Parkrun","html":"Hart & Bosch Village Parkrun"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A free, fun and friendly weekly 5k community event. The parkrun begins at 08:00 until 10:00 every Saturday.","html":"A free, fun and friendly weekly 5k community event. The parkrun begins at 08:00 until 10:00 every Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"My Run @ Hart & Bosch Village","html":"My Run @ Hart & Bosch Village "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This running event takes place at the Hart & Bosch Village, every Sunday from 07:00 until 08:00. Participants can choose to do a 2.5km and 5km walks/runs.Curro Mossel Bay Parkrun","html":"This running event takes place at the Hart & Bosch Village, every Sunday from 07:00 until 08:00. Participants can choose to do a 2.5km and 5km walks/runs.

Curro Mossel Bay Parkrun "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Curro Mossel Bay hosts a weekly 5km parkrun beginning at 08:00 until 09:00 every Saturday morning. The meeting point is at Curro Mossel Bay in Heiderand.","html":"Curro Mossel Bay hosts a weekly 5km parkrun beginning at 08:00 until 09:00 every Saturday morning. The meeting point is at Curro Mossel Bay in Heiderand."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
